title: TrustRegistrySync
description: Delta-sync resource for mobile wallet trust registry updates. Provides CSCA/DSC anchor data from the /v1/trust-registry endpoints so wallets can sync incrementally rather than downloading the full trust store on every launch.

sync_token.description: Opaque cursor representing the current sync position. Pass as 'since' on the next request to receive only changes since this point.

sequence.description: Monotonically increasing sequence number for this registry version

entries.description: CSCA/DSC trust anchor entries added or removed since the last sync

anchor_type.description: CSCA = Country Signing Certificate Authority. DSC = Document Signer Certificate.

operation.description: ADD: new trust anchor available. REMOVE: anchor revoked or expired.

country_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 or ICAO alpha-3 country code

certificate_pem.description: PEM-encoded certificate; null for REMOVE operations

source.description: Where this entry was sourced from

has_more.description: true if more pages are available; follow sync_token to continue
